summary.business_type: Local healthcare (dental clinic, brick-and-mortar) — Vitória-ES, Brazil
summary.limitations: Live HTTP access to sorriemais.com blocked by session egress policy; audit performed on the exact GitHub Pages deploy source (commit d44358c). Live-only checks (redirect chains, response headers, field CWV) deferred to GSC/PageSpeed.
top_findings: Self-serving aggregateRating in Dentist JSON-LD (Google review snippet policy risk)
Titles 75-95 chars and meta descriptions 187-276 chars on ~5 pages (SERP truncation)
Hero image 247.8 KB JPG without WebP/AVIF variant (LCP candidate)
4 homepage images missing loading=lazy and width/height (CLS risk)
Clareamento Dental offered in OfferCatalog and form but has no dedicated landing page
quick_wins: Add lazy loading + dimensions to below-fold homepage images
Strip leftover authoring/template comments from 5 HTML files

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Valid robots.txt (allow all) with sitemap reference
sitemap.xml: 15 URLs, real lastmod, 1:1 match with self-referencing canonicals
Custom 404 with noindex; single canonical host (apex, no www); zero http:// internal links
favicon.ico + PNG + apple-touch-icon + site.webmanifest present

findings.title: Custom headers (HSTS, Cache-Control) not configurable on GitHub Pages
findings.description: Platform limitation; server, compression and charset are GitHub defaults.
findings.recommendation: Acceptable at this scale; revisit if migrating to Netlify/Cloudflare Pages.

findings.title: www/http redirect chains not verified live
findings.description: Session network policy blocked live requests.
findings.recommendation: Verify with curl -I or GSC outside this environment.

findings.title: CSS cache busting via query string (?v=3)
findings.description: Some CDNs ignore query-string variants.
findings.recommendation: Prefer filename fingerprinting.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Named, verifiable author (Dra. Karine Marinho Ribeiro, CRO-ES 10983) with ProfilePage; author+reviewedBy resolved via @id on all 9 posts
Posts 1,800-3,300 words, unique, FAQ text identical between page and schema
CFO compliance: TCLE cited on before/after, result-variance disclaimers, CNPJ/CRO/EPAO in footer
Coherent topic cluster: 3 service pillars + 9 supporting posts with internal links

findings.title: Clareamento Dental has no dedicated page
findings.description: Service listed in OfferCatalog (without url) and in the booking form, but no landing page targets 'clareamento dental vitória'.
findings.recommendation: Create /clareamento-dental-vitoria/ pillar and add its url to the Offer.

findings.title: Authoring/template comments left in HTML
findings.description: Editorial instructions visible in view-source in blog/index.html:133, 4 posts, and dra-karine-marinho/index.html:217.
findings.recommendation: Remove comments.

findings.title: Missing graduation institution/year and hasCredential on Person
findings.description: Internal note in the file acknowledges the gap.
findings.recommendation: Collect data and add to copy + JSON-LD.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: 16/16 unique titles, 15/15 unique descriptions, exactly one H1 per page, correct H2/H3 hierarchy
OG + Twitter Card complete on all indexable pages with sized og:image
92 internal links verified against filesystem — zero broken
Visible breadcrumbs + BreadcrumbList site-wide; descriptive anchors

findings.title: Titles exceed ~60 chars on 5 pages
findings.description: /dra-karine-marinho/ (95), /blog/ (77), clareamento-no-alinhador (77), alinhador-ou-aparelho (75), facetas-de-porcelana (71).
findings.recommendation: Rewrite keeping keyword first, <= 60 chars.

findings.title: Meta descriptions exceed ~160 chars on 6 pages
findings.description: Max 276 chars on /dra-karine-marinho/.
findings.recommendation: Trim to 150-160 chars keeping CTA + locality.

findings.title: meta keywords present on homepage
findings.description: Ignored by Google.
findings.recommendation: Optional removal.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: 71 JSON-LD blocks across 15 pages, 100% parse-valid
Entity graph via @id: Dentist #clinica <-> Person #dentista; NAP identical in every block
Dentist complete: address, geo, openingHoursSpecification, priceRange, sameAs (Maps/Instagram/Doctoralia), areaServed (4 cities), hasMap, EPAO identifier
13 FAQPage (64 questions) all matching visible content; 9 BlogPosting with valid dates

findings.title: Self-serving aggregateRating in Dentist schema
findings.description: 5.0/46 Google reviews self-published in the site's own LocalBusiness markup violates Google review snippet guidelines; markup is ignored and risks a structured-data manual action.
findings.recommendation: Remove aggregateRating from JSON-LD; keep the rating visible in content linking to the Google profile.

findings.title: FAQ rich results restricted since 2023
findings.description: Google only shows FAQ rich results for high-authority gov/health sites; value is now mainly GEO/AI.
findings.recommendation: Keep (zero cost), without rich-snippet expectations.

findings.title: Clareamento Offer without url
findings.description: Service in OfferCatalog lacks url.
findings.recommendation: Fix when the landing page is created.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Lean payload: home HTML 34.9 KB, CSS 25 KB, own JS 6.4 KB, no frameworks
preconnect to Google Fonts; hero has fetchpriority=high + declared dimensions
Videos (5.6 MB + 3.1 MB) with preload=none and posters; GA4 is the only third-party script

findings.title: Hero 247.8 KB JPG without modern format
findings.description: LCP candidate on every page using it; site already has the <picture> WebP pattern elsewhere.
findings.recommendation: AVIF/WebP via <picture>, target < 90 KB.

findings.title: 4 homepage images without lazy/dimensions
findings.description: marca_topo.png 34 KB, antes_apos_1 102 KB, antes_apos_2 115 KB, marca_rodape.png 52 KB.
findings.recommendation: Add width/height everywhere; lazy below the fold.

findings.title: Google Fonts: 2 families / 9 weights external
findings.description: Extra RTT on first load.
findings.recommendation: Consider self-hosting subset with font-display: swap.

findings.title: Field CWV unmeasured
findings.description: No live access this session.
findings.recommendation: Run PageSpeed Insights / check CrUX in GSC.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: robots.txt allows all AI crawlers (GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot)
Highly citable content: 64 self-contained FAQ answers, direct first-paragraph definitions, concrete facts
Consistent entity + sameAs to Maps/Instagram/Doctoralia; transactional 'where to book' section with areaServed

findings.title: llms.txt absent
findings.description: Per claude-seo evidence (Mueller/Illyes, SE Ranking 300k-domain study), llms.txt is not a citation lever today; presence reported without score weight.
findings.recommendation: Create for zero-cost hygiene.

findings.title: Thin entity graph beyond Doctoralia
findings.description: No Wikidata/association/directory presence detected on-site.
findings.recommendation: Expand authoritative citations and GBP activity.

categories.name: Images
what_works: ~98% of images have descriptive, localized alt text
All 26 referenced local images exist; valid og:image on every page; descriptive filenames

findings.title: Legacy formats dominate
findings.description: Hero JPG 248 KB, before/after JPEG 102+115 KB, PNG logos 34-52 KB.
findings.recommendation: WebP/AVIF for photos; SVG for logos (logo.svg exists).

findings.title: ~1 decorative image per page without explicit alt
findings.description: Missing alt attribute rather than deliberate alt="".
findings.recommendation: Use empty alt on decorative images.

phases.name: Phase 1: Risk Fixes
items: Remove aggregateRating from Dentist JSON-LD site-wide
Shorten over-length titles (5 pages) and descriptions (6 pages)

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add lazy + dimensions to 4 homepage images
Convert before/after and logos to modern formats
Measure field CWV and verify redirect chains (GSC/PSI/curl outside this environment)

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Expand entity citations and GBP activity

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Weekly blog cadence with real lastmod
GSC: indexation of 15 URLs, CTR delta after Phase 1, local queries
